positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical vertical arrangement featuring stylized cosmic elements mixed with elegant flora. Central subject is a crescent moon surrounded by intertwining, delicate botanical vines, lavender sprigs, and geometric stars. The style must mimic sophisticated line art and vector illustration, suitable for screen printing. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight navy, faded teal, burnt gold, and creamy ivory. Focus on clean silhouettes, crisp outlines, and significant negative space around the main motifs. Studio lighting, elegant composition, print-ready digital artwork.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, grunge, photorealism, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition
